case_title: MOHAMMED SOYEB PALYA VS. WAGEWORKS, INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF REPORTED THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED AND THE DEFENDANT HAS PAID THE FULL AMOUNT OF $2000.00. PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED SOYEB PALYA IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WAGEWORKS, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY PALYA, MOHAMMED SOYEB AS TO DEFENDANT WAGEWORKS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALYA, MOHAMMED SOYEB AS TO DEFENDANT WAGEWORKS, INC
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PALYA, MOHAMMED SOYEB
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-07-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WAGEWORKS, INC
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
